profile.title: Profile
profile.usernameWarning: Changing your handle releases the old one once its record expires — links using it will stop working.
profile.publicDesc: Anyone can view your profile and find you by {'@'}username.
profile.privateDesc: Profile hidden from other people; username not discoverable.

security.recoveryPhraseDesc: Your secret backup to restore your account (24 words)
security.lockDesc: Clear secrets from memory and require your password
security.biometricDesc: Use Touch ID/Face ID to unlock on this device
security.biometricUnavailable: Biometrics are not available on this device.
security.enterPasswordToEnable: Enter your password to enable biometric unlock.
security.biometricUnavailableRuntime: Biometric support is unavailable right now on this runtime.
security.noActiveProfile: No active profile — unlock a profile before enabling biometrics.
security.biometricSessionOnly: Biometric unlock enabled for this app session only (dev runtime keychain limitation).
security.keychainEntitlement: macOS keychain entitlement is missing for this runtime (-34018). Use a bundled/signed app build, then enable biometrics again.
security.biometricCleared: Biometric credential cleared for this profile.

personalization.shortcutsHint: Click a shortcut's key binding to record a new one. Press Escape to cancel.

storage.title: Storage
storage.cached: none cached | {count} item cached | {count} items cached

relays.title: Community connections
relays.hint: Extra helpers to connect and route through. They help you reach other people only — they cannot vouch for usernames, so adding one is safe.
relays.empty: No community connections added. The built-in ones are always used.
relays.saved: Saved. New connections take effect the next time the app starts.

plugins.intro: Install, enable, and manage community-made learning elements. Plugins run in a locked sandbox with no network access; permissions (microphone, camera, etc.) are granted per-plugin on first use.
plugins.installHint: Point to a directory containing manifest.json, manifest.sig, and the entry HTML the manifest references.
plugins.enterPath: Enter the path to a plugin bundle directory.
plugins.noneDesc: Install a plugin above to add new learning and assessment element types.
plugins.searchPlaceholder: Search plugins by name, permission, tag…
plugins.inboxIntro: Pending submissions from learners using the IRL Review plugin on this device.
plugins.inboxEmptyDesc: When a learner submits work to the IRL Review plugin, it will appear here.
plugins.filesAttached: no files | {count} file attached | {count} files attached
plugins.mySubmissionsIntro: Submissions you have sent to instructors through the IRL Review plugin.
plugins.mySubmissionsEmptyDesc: Use the IRL Review plugin inside a course to submit work for review.
plugins.uninstallBody: Remove {name} v{version}? Courses that use it will stop working until you re-install.
plugins.noSkills: The learner did not declare any skills.
plugins.feedbackPlaceholder: Tell the learner what worked and what to improve…

guardian.title: My Guardian
guardian.intro: Guardians see your learning activity on their own device. This page shows exactly who is linked and what is shared.
guardian.noneLearner: No one is overseeing this account.
guardian.noneOther: Guardian links only apply to learner accounts.
guardian.minorNote: You'll be able to remove your guardian when you turn 18. Until then, only your guardian can unlink from their device.
guardian.encryptedNote: Everything travels encrypted directly between your devices — never through a server, never published.
guardian.addHint: Share a one-time code with a parent/guardian to link them.

shared.progress: Per-lesson progress, scores, and time spent

advanced.syncNote: Settings marked sync reach your other devices automatically. Settings marked device stay on this device only.

export.title: Export Recovery Phrase
export.warning: Your recovery phrase gives full access to your account and credentials. Only export it in a private, secure place.
